name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for protecting confidential information shared between two parties evaluating a potential business relationship.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, containing the key variables and signature blocks to accompany the standard terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement covering access, use, payment, privacy, security, and liability terms for cloud-based software services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early product access arrangements where a partner provides feedback in exchange for early use of a product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime targets, response time commitments, service credits, and remedies for cloud services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement governing consulting, development, and other professional services engagements including deliverables, IP ownership, and payment.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for GDPR and data protection compliance, covering processor obligations, data transfers, security incidents, and audit rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for business partnerships including cooperation terms, trademark licensing, payment, and mutual indemnification.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or installable software, covering licensing, restrictions, updates, warranties, and IP rights.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for trial or evaluation access to a product before committing to a longer-term definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA compliance, covering PHI handling, safeguards, breach notification, and subcontractor obligations.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an existing agreement with terms for AI services, model training restrictions, IP ownership of inputs and outputs, and AI-specific disclaimers.
